title: oenothera cheiranthifolia var. contorta
intro: Oenothera cheiranthifolia var. contorta, also known as twisted evening primrose, is a perennial plant in the willow-herb family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The plant's extracts and roots have been used to promote overall health and well-being, with benefits including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Oenothera cheiranthifolia var. contorta include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
